items.name: Chips & Salsa
items.description: Warm house made corn tortilla chips served with a roasted tomato salsa and a tomatillo (green) salsa — two separate salsas

items.name: Guacamole
items.description: Avocado, fresh jalapeños, red onion and cilantro, topped with queso fresco, served with warm housemade corn tortilla chips and a roasted tomato salsa and a tomatillo (green) salsa — two separate salsas

items.name: Quesadilla
items.description: Flour tortilla folded with melted queso oaxaca, served with crema and pico de gallo
items.notes: Protein add-ons available off-menu (chicken, steak, shrimp, birria, or veggie — matching the Nachos add-ons); exact pricing not confirmed

items.name: Calamari
items.description: Deep fried breaded tubes and tentacles with jalapeño slices, served with chipotle aioli and jalapeño aioli

items.name: Nachos
items.description: Housemade corn tortilla chips, refried pinto beans, queso oaxaca, topped with guacamole, pico de gallo, house pickled jalapeños and crema
items.notes: Add-ons (shared across Starters section): grilled chicken +$12, steak +$16, shrimp +$14, sautéed veggies +$8, chile verde +$12, birria +$12. Also available off-menu in a half order or full order — most guests order the half, which is still large. Substantially bigger/more filling than the Guacamole as an actual portion.

items.name: New England Clam Chowder
items.description: Creamy chowder with clams, potato, celery, carrot, and onion, topped with bacon and cilantro

items.name: Caesar Salad
items.description: Chopped romaine with creamy housemade Caesar dressing, parmesan and sourdough croutons

items.name: House Salad
items.description: Mixed greens with avocado, cucumber, pico de gallo, queso fresco and house made tortilla strips, dressed with creamy lime dressing
items.notes: Add-ons (shared across Soup & Salad section): grilled chicken +$12, steak +$16, shrimp +$14, sautéed veggies +$8

items.name: Ceviche
items.description: Halibut and shrimp marinated in fresh lime juice with avocado, jalapeño, onion and tomato, served with warm housemade corn tortilla chips

items.name: Dungeness Crab Tostadas
items.description: Corn tostadas with crab, guacamole, chipotle aioli and cilantro, served with fresh lemon, topped with Maldon's sea salt

items.name: Chile Verde Plate
items.description: Slow roasted pork with tomatillos and jalapeños, topped with cilantro, served with Spanish rice, refried beans and warm flour tortillas

items.name: Chile Verde Enchiladas
items.description: Pork chile verde wrapped in corn tortillas with queso oaxaca, smothered in chile verde, topped with cilantro, served with Spanish rice and refried beans

items.name: El Ultimo Burrito
items.description: Choice of chicken, shrimp or chile verde wrapped in a flour tortilla with refried beans, Spanish rice, pico de gallo, lime crema and queso oaxaca, smothered and topped with queso fresco and cilantro

items.name: Grilled Skirt Steak
items.description: Marinated skirt steak grilled medium rare, topped with chimichurri, served with Spanish rice, refried beans and warm corn tortillas

items.name: Blackened Shrimp
items.description: Blackened shrimp, cabbage, lime crema and cilantro

items.name: Baja Fish
items.description: Beer battered halibut, cabbage, chipotle aioli, topped with avocado, cilantro and Maldon's sea salt

items.name: Grilled Chicken
items.description: Marinated grilled chicken with queso fresco, lime crema, fresh pico de gallo and cilantro

items.name: Skirt Steak
items.description: Marinated skirt steak grilled with peppers and onions, topped with queso fresco and chimichurri

items.name: Quesabirria
items.description: Braised beef and melted queso oaxaca folded into corn tortillas, topped with white onion and cilantro, served with a side of consommé

items.name: Blackened Shrimp Enchiladas
items.description: Blackened shrimp wrapped in corn tortillas with queso oaxaca, smothered in house enchilada sauce, served with Spanish rice and refried beans

items.name: Shrimp de Ajo
items.description: Shrimp sautéed with peppers and onions in garlic, butter and white wine, served with Spanish rice and refried beans

items.name: Shrimp Diabla
items.description: Shrimp sautéed with garlic, peppers and onions in a spicy diabla sauce, served with Spanish rice and refried beans

items.name: Branzino
items.description: Whole fried fish served with house side salad, fresh lemon, and topped with Maldon's sea salt
